items.title: AI is being used to resurrect the voices of dead pilots
items.summary: People used AI on a spectrogram image of cockpit recordings to reconstruct them, forcing the NTSB to temporarily block access to its docket system.
items.reason: AI 领域重要动态，来自一线科技媒体的深度报道。

items.title: Google goes for the glitter with disco-ball icons: ‘Are y’all sure you still want this?’
items.summary: You can now disco ball-ify your entire Pixel home screen, says Google.
items.reason: AI 领域重要动态，来自一线科技媒体的深度报道。

items.title: How VCs and founders use inflated ‘ARR’ to crown AI startups
items.summary: Some AI startups are stretching traditional revenue metrics when talking about progress publicly. And their investors are fully aware.
items.reason: AI 领域重要动态，来自一线科技媒体的深度报道。

items.title: US scrambles to stop Internet users re-creating dead pilots’ voices
items.summary: Workaround flouts law that bans NTSB disclosures of cockpit audio recordings.
items.reason: AI 领域重要动态，来自一线科技媒体的深度报道。

items.title: Trump abruptly cancels EO signing event after top AI firm CEOs declined to go
items.summary: Trump delays AI safety testing EO, claiming it would be an innovation “blocker.”
